title: ParticipantWakeV2
description: I-010C ParticipantWakeV2@1 — the normal participant turn input: an explicit attention source (WAKE, DEFER, ERROR_FALLBACK, or non-social PREATTENTION_BYPASS), the factual observation (a full I-010A document), independent positive participant budgets, and optional attention advice that appears only on source WAKE (FR-013). No admission meta-answer, composed reply, or social ledger is part of the contract.

source.$comment: PREATTENTION_BYPASS is a lifecycle fact, not a social judgment.

allOf.$comment: FR-013: DEFER, ERROR_FALLBACK, and PREATTENTION_BYPASS wakes are advice-free because no classifier advice exists for those sources.
